chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6092 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.700/2025. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For hearing of main case. 17.01.2025 Mr. Faisal Iqbal, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Kamran Khan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. 1. Urgency granted. 2&3. The prayer clause seeks orders of this Division Bench for building a bridge. Prima facie the matters falls within the executive domain and no actionable cause per Article 199 of the Constitution was articulated before this Court. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
